summary: Any person likely to be affected by the proposed inclusion of 'Automobile Industry' in Part I of the Schedule to the Minimum Wages Act must submit objections or suggestions in writing to the Special Secretary, Labour and Skills (E) Department, Government Secretariat, Thiruvananthapuram within three months of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette.

source_refs.citation_span: page:2 / paragraph beginning 'Objections or suggestions, if any, in respect of the said proposal'
